info.title: Email Finder API
info.description: Email Finder API. Given a domain, crawls contact/about/team pages and generates common email patterns (info@, contact@, etc.), then verifies MX records for deliverability. Returns confidence-scored email addresses. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Given a domain, crawls contact/about/team pages and generates common email patterns (info@, contact@, etc.), then verifies MX records for deliverability. Returns confidence-scored email addresses.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
